query: SELECT properties.$pathname as page, count(if(event='popup_shown', 1, NULL)) as shown, count(if(event='popup_form_submitted', 1, NULL)) as submitted, count(if(event='popup_dismissed', 1, NULL)) as dismissed FROM events WHERE event IN ('popup_shown','popup_form_submitted','popup_dismissed') AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY AND properties.$ip != '137.103.50.217' GROUP BY page ORDER BY shown DESC LIMIT 10
